{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230442281A9F745221D0B2849929"}"},"total":188},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7394708927417631513","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"听了30多章，我个人感觉很好看 推荐！不仅仅是破案还掺杂着灵异，让人听了毛骨悚然，又带着搞笑，李为、欧阳这俩人物我挺喜欢的，别的人物我也喜欢，李为沉着冷静,刀子嘴豆腐心，是个为人民负责任的好警察，欧阳有点傻傻的感觉哈哈哈，不过是个励志的人，作者继续加油啊，也希望这本书越来越多的人能看到。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721718555,"group_id":"7264902950340791348","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3clRAM96/H72SdVD2+F3PaZAPlzYi14Yw+NHq/ysqxw","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0c53cdd6c8464d0d8a5efd586c3b1fd8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789948&x-signature=1cGbJOmKG0p1tkCimeqGR%2BxMgaM%3D","user_id":"3908083456949672","user_name":"听风畔."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3908083456949672","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7264902950340791348","book_info":{"abstract":"【恐怖+灵异+悬疑+探险+脑洞+破案+阴阳风水】
李为带领的刑侦大队在阴差阳错下跟死对头欧阳组成破案小组，在经历一系列骇人听闻的重大案件后，惊险恐怖的经历让原本敌对的两人成为生死搭档。
正当所有人都以为一切终于结束时，没想到更大的噩梦才刚刚开始……
【衣架杀人】【镜中有鬼】【床下的人】【爱情汤】【妻子的肉】【眼球奶茶】【女生宿舍】【乳房花】【娃娃坟】【人肉场】【死亡诅咒】【诡异厕所】【午夜公交】【见鬼游戏】……
